author: kalo9480
potuz
content: This was one of my only requests on the API, to use the index instead of pubkey but was rejected. Perhaps you can raise it as an issue? As for the signing. It's the authorization are signed, they are optional though, but I think it'll be a disadvantage for DVT clusters if they can't sign authorizations so a solution for that problem needs to be done. These can be signed over an epoch in advance so not in the hot path, but also can't be prepared with the client since they sign over the slot number

author: nflaig
content:
> but also can't be prepared with the client since they sign over the slot number
I asked this Bharath before and the spec says i'ts the bid slot/proposal slot, or is it the current slot? really not clear from a spec pov

author: nflaig
content: on the api it says bid slot, in the `.md` it says current slot iirc

author: potuz
content: It's the slot in which you will be proposing

author: nflaig
content: even if you submit them AOT?

author: potuz
content: Yes and you can do this for N+1 at epoch N

author: nflaig
content: yes, I was saying that here https://discord.com/channels/595666850260713488/892088344438255616/1518936679161925672, it was the last discussion on a public record where Bharath was part of 😢  but he said it should be current slot, I disagree though, we should use the proposal slot for JIT **and** AOT (if we decide to do that at all)

author: potuz
content: Yeah definitely, current slot works for that specific replay attack but it doesn't make sense not to send the proposal one

author: nflaig
content: someone has to polish the builder specs at some point, it's not entirely clear and there are inconsistencies
